title: Lysten
description: A little mod that adds client specific (& silly) features to Fabric
body:
A "small" but interesting client-side mod that allows you to change some visual & render stuff, inspired by a lot of **other clients** out there!  

It's possible to disable _view bobbing from affecting screen_, change the way _dropped items, entity death animation, name tag, block outline, subtitles and particles are rendered_... And that's not all! There are some features that doesn't involve changing the game, like toggling _blur_ and a _customizable text_ for the inventory, an _arrow counter_ for bows and crossbows in the inventory, as well as _lighter (lower gravity) leaves particles_... from old minecraft!  

It currently targets some **random** parts of the game, but it does offer a nice range of toggles, feel free to take a look at them in the [gallery tab](https://modrinth.com/mod/lysten/gallery)!  

You can access the mod's config by directly modifying its file `.minecraft/config/lysten.properties`, through [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) or the button in the pause menu!
